root_text.an4.206:2.2: Idha, bhikkhave, ekacco micchādiṭṭhiko hoti …pe… micchāñāṇī hoti, micchāvimutti hoti.
root_text.an4.206:3.2: Idha, bhikkhave, ekacco attanā ca micchādiṭṭhiko hoti, parañca micchādiṭṭhiyā samādapeti …pe… attanā ca micchāñāṇī hoti, parañca micchāñāṇe samādapeti;
root_text.an4.206:3.3: attanā ca micchāvimutti hoti, parañca micchāvimuttiyā samādapeti.
root_text.an4.206:4.2: Idha, bhikkhave, ekacco sammādiṭṭhiko hoti …pe… sammāñāṇī hoti, sammāvimutti hoti.
root_text.an4.206:5.2: Idha, bhikkhave, ekacco attanā ca sammādiṭṭhiko hoti, parañca sammādiṭṭhiyā samādapeti …pe… attanā ca sammāñāṇī hoti, parañca sammāñāṇe samādapeti;
root_text.an4.206:5.3: attanā ca sammāvimutti hoti, parañca sammāvimuttiyā samādapeti.

translation_text.an4.206:1.1: “Mendicants, I will teach you an untrue person and an even more untrue person,
translation_text.an4.206:1.2: a true person and an even truer person.
translation_text.an4.206:2.1: And what is an untrue person?
translation_text.an4.206:2.2: It’s someone who has wrong view, wrong thought, wrong speech, wrong action, wrong livelihood, wrong effort, wrong mindfulness, wrong immersion, wrong knowledge, and wrong freedom.
translation_text.an4.206:2.3: This is called an untrue person.
translation_text.an4.206:3.1: And what is an even more untrue person?
translation_text.an4.206:3.2: It’s someone who has wrong view, wrong thought, wrong speech, wrong action, wrong livelihood, wrong effort, wrong mindfulness, wrong immersion, wrong knowledge, and wrong freedom. And they encourage others in these same qualities.
translation_text.an4.206:3.4: This is called an even more untrue person.
translation_text.an4.206:4.1: And what is a true person?
translation_text.an4.206:4.2: It’s someone who has right view, right thought, right speech, right action, right livelihood, right effort, right mindfulness, right immersion, right knowledge, and right freedom.
translation_text.an4.206:4.3: This is called a true person.
translation_text.an4.206:5.1: And what is an even truer person?
translation_text.an4.206:5.2: It’s someone who has right view, right thought, right speech, right action, right livelihood, right effort, right mindfulness, right immersion, right knowledge, and right freedom. And they encourage others in these same qualities.
translation_text.an4.206:5.4: This is called an even truer person.”
